Direct capture showed a normal C64 BASIC screen through RetroArch Frodo with a minimal .p00 file. The earlier Pacmania.zip test contains .tap content, while Frodo supports d64/t64/x64/p00/lnx/zip but not tap/prg, so this was a content-format mismatch rather than video corruption.

ChaiLove embeds SDL1 and requires SDL_VIDEODRIVER=LIBRETROvideo so its internal SDL video driver is selected. Added a ChaiLove-specific launcher override and confirmed RetroArch reaches A30 FBO setup and exits cleanly after 120 frames.

ChaiLove embeds SDL1 and failed when PicoArch exported SDL_VIDEODRIVER=fbcon. Added a ChaiLove-specific launcher override to LIBRETROvideo; direct PicoArch probe reaches content load, Screen 480x480, and reported 60 fps.

FreeChaF requires sl31254.bin plus sl31253.bin or sl90025.bin in /mnt/SDCARD/Bios. The A30 has none of these, so the core fell back to experimental HLE and stopped on Unsupported HLE function 0xd0. Launcher now fails fast with the required filenames and MD5 values instead of leaving RetroArch in dummy-core mode.
